mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in the federal funds rate raises the discount rate applied to future corporate cash flows, directly compressing equity valuations and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns during rate hikes are not significantly lower than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: The unemployment rate crossing above 4.5 percent signals a deteriorating labor market that triggers recession fears, causing investors to sell equities and producing negative forward returns.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite the unemployment threshold being breached.

mechanism_narrative: Rising retail sales combined with stable inflation indicates robust consumer demand without economic overheating, supporting corporate revenue growth and generating positive equity returns over a quarter.
failure_condition: Joint signal produces negative 60d returns in > 55% of instances, or interaction term loses statistical significance in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating industrial production signals expanding manufacturing capacity and economic strength, which drives equity returns positively specifically during early-to-mid cycle expansions when growth expectations are rising.
failure_condition: Signal direction flips to negative during early-cycle expansions, or Rank IC falls below 0.02 in this specific regime over a 3-year window.

mechanism_narrative: Higher housing starts reflect strong construction activity and consumer confidence in the housing market, leading to immediate positive equity returns over a one-week horizon as investors price in near-term economic momentum.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are negative in > 50% of periods following housing starts increases, or signal shows no predictive power in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: The consumer price index exceeding 325 triggers expectations of aggressive central bank tightening to combat inflation, compressing equity valuations and generating negative forward returns.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of instances when CPIAUCSL crosses above 325, or threshold loses predictive accuracy in out-of-sample periods.

mechanism_narrative: Rising nonfarm payrolls alongside falling unemployment indicates a strengthening labor market that boosts consumer spending and corporate profits, driving positive equity returns over a one-month horizon.
failure_condition: Interaction signal yields negative 20d returns in > 55% of instances, or joint effect is statistically indistinguishable from zero in walk-forward validation.

mechanism_narrative: Declining real GDP growth signals economic contraction that negatively impacts corporate earnings and equity returns specifically during late-cycle downturns when growth momentum reverses.
failure_condition: Signal produces positive 60d returns in > 50% of late-cycle contraction periods, or Rank IC remains below 0.03 in this regime over a 3-year window.
